feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Help with CSEP_MAT_BOM* Modules
entry.content:
Hello, need the help of the community with this one;

Trying to use the CSEP_MAT_BOM* modules' function to add items to an existing material, I have to deal with the conversion problem with MATNR already dealt with in notes 2185211 (asking to apply the note correction) and in note 2493685 (asking to create a Z program and execute it).
The problem is that both these two solutions aren't compatible with S/4 HANA.


Help is much appreciated.

entry.title: Output control F-36
entry.content:
When we post a document in transaction F-36 for post dated checks. We get a new screen "Overview Output Management: Output" that we would like to deactivate and skip in this process. How may we deactivate it?

Thanks!

entry.title: BATMAS Idoc failed with error 'Assignment was not created' and 'Object XXXX XXXX does not exist'.
entry.content:
BATMAS Idoc failed with error 'Assignment was not created' and 'Object XXXX XXXX does not exist'.I have checked in MSC3N to check if the class type and class exists. But its present already. Any inputs from the SAP experts? or need more info on the issue let me know.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to access HTML5 Application in SAP BTP Cloud Foundry from mobile device
entry.content:
I create app in BAS and deploy to SAP BTP Cloud Foundry.

I would like to access this app from mobile device.

Is it possible to access like via app url or something?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Assets with NBV for already depreciated assets
entry.content:
Issue  Description : For the below asset has NBV and  planned depreciation is not being calculated under posted values tab. Useful life of the asset is already expired.

Kindly suggest on how to depreciate the balance amount lying in the asset.

  •  
  • How to restrict posting to an asset for which NBV is zero and useful life is already expired ?
  •  
  • Also let us know if we can place any BTE validation to avoid such capitalization/acquisition further.
  •  
  • How to identify the asset for which assets are fully depreciated & further acquisitions are made after end of useful life and for which depreciation is not getting posted
  •  

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sales Commissions for external agents & Co.
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

is it possible to use the SD commission from ECC in S/4HANA until it expires?

Kind regards
Hüseyin Günes

entry.title: Production table SAPHANADB/ Can 1DH/SL000000007 be cleared?
entry.content:
Can the production table /1DH/SL0000007 be cleared? I will use SQL TRUNCATE TABLE SAPHANADB./1DH/SL000000007。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Can you run MD_MRP_FORCE_CLASSIC in background to set certain materials to Classic MRP upfront
entry.content: Due to an active enhancement we cannot use MRP live for a specific material type and they are recognized by a specific MRP controller. When a new material is created for this material type, can we then run transaction MD_MRP_FORCE_CLASSIC in a background job or other program to set the Classic MRP setting upfront for these newly created materials?  This will prevent that someone has to go into MD_MRP_FORCE_CLASSIC and manually has to set the Classic MRP.

entry.title: Third party Stock
entry.content: Please, Somedody knows how Do I lanch in Accounting Third party in my company wit the same value of invoice?

entry.title: Obsolete of VKM1
entry.content:
Hello,

 

In EWA report, it mentions we are still using "VKM1" but it must not be used anymore. Recommended successor mentioned as "UKM_MY_DCDS".

Is there any problem if we continue using "VKM1" but not switch to "UKM_MY_DCDS"?

 

Please advise, thank you very much.

 

Best PERSON_NAME,
Gore


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Data Migration with forground Processing
entry.content:
How to perform Data Migration with foreground Processing?

entry.title: SAP Custom Space and Page Multi-language
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

 

Is it possible to place it in a custom  space in multilanguage, for example, if when I enter English it shows me the name of the space in English and if I enter Spanish I get the name of the space in Spanish?

 

Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Migration Cockpit: Error: Instance XXXX skipped to avoid multiple updates
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I am trying to extend material master to another plant and storage location using Migration Cockpit, I use Migration Object "Product - extend existing record by new org levels",

I fill in  Basic Data Sheet (Product Number, Run ID), Plant Data Sheet (Product Number, Run ID, Plant), Storage Location Sheet (Product Number, Run ID, Plant, Storage Location).

For Upload to Mapping Tasks steps are suceed, but for Simulate Steps, I got error message like this :

Migration Cockpit: Error: Instance XXXX skipped to avoid multiple updates

This issue already mentioned in SAP Note 3356771, is this migration object can not be used to upload case like I mentioned above?

entry.title: Split resource option not editable in operation tab of Change Maintenance order app
entry.content:
In Change maintenance order app under operation, I am not able to add resource / split under requirement tab. Field is not editable, but we can be able to perform this action in GUI using IW32. 

Could you please suggest the way to fix the issue. User unable to add resource directly and they need to use IW32 every time to add resource.

entry.title: Question about 10Steps2S4 for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Conversion in 2025
entry.content:
Good evening, everyone!

Does anyone know if there is a 10Steps2S4 for Functionals focused on the conversion to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition in 2025? If anyone can confirm or has more details, I’d really appreciate it!

#SAPS/4HANA #10Steps2S4

Heitor Lima

entry.title: 400 Bad HTTP Request
entry.content:
Hello, SAP Community!

We’re encountering an HTTP 400 Bad Request error when attempting to send data to an external server via API from our SAP S/4HANA system. I’d like to share details about the issue and gather insights on possible solutions.

Issue Details:

  1. Setup: SAP S/4HANA system using API for data transfer to an external server.

  2. Error: HTTP 400 Bad Request received in the SAP system when trying to send the data.

  3. SMICM Logs: The SMICM logs reveal the following error message:

    ERROR => HttpParseResponseHeader: illegal status code: 610; status reason: Undefined

  4. Context: This error seems to point to an issue in parsing the response header. The status code 610 is unexpected, and "Undefined" status suggests there’s an invalid response format coming from the server.

Troubleshooting Steps Taken So Far:

  1. Checked API Payload and Headers: Verified the JSON structure and ensured that the Content-Type is set to application/json.
  2. Validated API Endpoint: Confirmed that the API endpoint URL and authentication parameters are accurate.
  3. Network Check: Verified network connectivity between SAP S/4HANA and the external server, confirming no firewall or connectivity blocks.
  4. icm/HTTP/max_request_size_KB parameter is currently set to its default value of 102400. We changed the parameter value dynamically in RZ11 to the maximum value, but the 400 Bad Request error persists

Questions for the Community:

  1. Header Parsing Issue: Has anyone else encountered the “illegal status code: 610” error in SMICM logs? If so, what was the root cause, and how did you resolve it?
  2. Additional Logging: Are there specific SAP transaction codes or logs where we could capture more detailed information about the HTTP request and response?
  3. SMICM Configurations: Could this issue be related to specific SMICM settings, or might there be configuration parameters to adjust to handle unexpected status codes?

Any advice or shared experiences would be greatly appreciated! If you've dealt with similar HTTP response parsing issues in SAP S/4HANA, especially around undefined status codes, your insights could be immensely helpful in resolving this challenge.

Thank you in advance!

Thanks & Regards,
Hemachandiran R
SAP Basis Administrator

entry.title: Cannot create WT with Sample Split /SCWM/QINSP253
entry.content:
Hi,

we are working in an ERP BS7 connected to a decentral EWM on S/4 HANA.

We are currently upgrading the EWM to S/4 HANA 2023 FPS01.

Since the upgrade, the QM Sample Process does not work anymore, as we are unable to create putaway warehouse tasks with the following message: /SCWM/QINSP253 "Can't create warehouse tasks until external sample is calculated".

The process did work in the old release without any issues ( on S4HANA 2021 02 (05/2022) FPS)

The strange part: 

In my POV, the Inspection document is updated with the correct External Sample size quantity. The status is fine as well. 

I am unsure, why we are unable to create an inbound warehouse task.

Am I missing something here? 

Config:

EWM

Thank yo

BR

Timo

entry.title: Recheck Documented Credit Decision automatically?
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a program we can run in the background that would "recheck" documented credit decision cases?

Let's say a sales order document is on credit block because the customer's credit limit is exceeded. After the customer made a payment, the blocked document should get rechecked because the credit exposure has been reduced enough to allow the sales order to get created, thus allowing the sales order to be released.

Would program RVKRED09 serve this function?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Prepayment Is not Getting Activated in PO ( No Tab is displayed)
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

We have activated Prepayment at company code level, but no where it is showing in the PO that this is related to Prepayment and also PPX Transaction Event is not getting triggered.

Can you please help us to achieve this cycle?

 

Thanks

entry.title: S4HANA GUI missing insert delete button on Notif DMS
entry.content:
S4HANA GUI notification not showing the insert and delete button. However it is showing on the Fiori app.

S4HANA VS ECC GUI notification- Document tab

Fiori App

Please provide any inputs to correct this issue. Thanks!
